evidence.claim: The system allows viewing the full transaction history of any user.
evidence.fact: The system offers a feature enabling authorized users to browse the complete past activity of any account holder.
evidence.user_story_span: view the full transaction history of any user
evidence.fact_span: browse the complete past activity of any account holder

evidence.claim: The admin has access to a user management interface.
evidence.fact: An administrator can disable a user's access or re-enable it through a control in the management panel.
evidence.user_story_span: The admin has access to a user management interface.

evidence.claim: Transaction history includes all financial or activity logs for a selected user.
evidence.fact: Using the admin interface, an operator can look at every withdrawal, attempted access, and balance change for a specific account.
evidence.user_story_span: Transaction history includes all financial or activity logs for a selected user.
evidence.fact_span: every withdrawal, attempted access, and balance change
